Package org.solenopsis.soap.enterprise

Class ApexTypeImplementor

java.lang.Object
org.solenopsis.soap.enterprise.SObject
org.solenopsis.soap.enterprise.ApexTypeImplementor
public class ApexTypeImplementor extends SObject

Java class for ApexTypeImplementor complex type

.

The following schema fragment specifies the expected content contained within this class.


 <complexType name="ApexTypeImplementor">
   <complexContent>
     <extension base="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}sObject">
       <sequence>
         <element name="ApexClass" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ApexClass" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ApexClassId" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ClassName" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ClassNamespacePrefix" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="DurableId" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="InterfaceApexClass" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ApexClass" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="InterfaceApexClassId" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="InterfaceName" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="InterfaceNamespacePrefix" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsConcrete" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
       </sequence>
     </extension>
   </complexContent>
 </complexType>
